case_title: CHRISTOPHER HEWES VS. LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HEWES, CHRISTOPHER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER HEWES IS PRESENT. LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SHOPIE LAU, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: NOTICE OF CONTINUED TRIAL DATE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEWES, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
